caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold across the chest, and a gold chain necklace is seated in a studio. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five stars and the words "URBAN HUSTLE." To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a logo featuring the letter "K" is visible. On the table in front of him sits a black mug with "THE TALK OUT" printed in red and white. In the lower-left corner, a circular logo contains the text "THE TALK OUT." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a consistent seated position, slightly turned to his right, with minimal movement as he continues speaking.
